reviewer: Gemini CLI - Elite Hostile Senior Engineer
summary: Multi-language Support (i18n) implementation successfully hardened and verified. Mandated invariants are strictly enforced.

I-010 (Hydration).evidence: middleware.ts sets NEXT_LOCALE cookie on first visit/redirect, ensuring SSR and first CSR fetch use identical locale.

I-011 (Dictionary).evidence: scripts/check-i18n.ts validates key parity and variable synchronicity; integrated into 'npm run build'.

I-012 (Currency).evidence: lib/i18n.ts enforces deterministic precision via precisionMap (e.g., JPY: 0, USD: 2), satisfying cross-locale financial consistency.

Spec Fidelity (hreflang).evidence: layout.tsx uses 'x-url' header propagated by middleware to calculate absolute URLs for SEO-compliant hreflang tags.

Edge Case Coverage.evidence: Middleware excludes public assets/API routes via regex and explicit prefix checks; propagates x-url header to Server Components.
